author: Jamal al-Din al-Mizzi (d. 742 AH)
edition: Bashshar Awwad Ma'ruf edition, Mu'assasat al-Risalah
significance: The comprehensive biographical dictionary of narrators in the six canonical hadith collections. 8,640 entries. Direct predecessor to Ibn Hajar's Tahdhib al-Tahdhib. Together they form the Tahdhib chain — the most important sequence of rijal works in Sunni scholarship.
